role_first.description: The semantic role of the first input (e.g., 'Material', 'Modifier', 'Symbol').

role_second.description: The semantic role of the second input.

trace.description: Derivation Path: Explains How the first input interacts with the second input to create the result. Focus on the interaction logic.

explanation.description: Concept Definition: Explains WHAT the result is. Encyclopedic definition, distinct from the derivation path.
